about.title: I breathe life into moving pictures
paragraphs: With over six years of experience in video editing and motion design, I have worked with brands, agencies, and independent creators to bring their visions to life.
Every cut, color, and transition serves the story. Whether it is a music video, brand film, or social campaign, I bring the same level of craft to every frame.

list.title: Biruhfit
list.desc: A cinematic music video blending surreal visuals with live-action footage.

list.title: Bricks
list.desc: A dynamic brand identity system with animated logos and typography.

list.title: Addisai
list.desc: A short documentary exploring identity through archival footage and interviews.

list.quote: Abrham understood everything extremely well, He wasn't just an editor, he truly understood what kind of ads performed for our brand, He consistently took full ownership of his work, which made him someone we could always rely on.
list.author: Elanora

list.quote: Overall great work, Abrham goes above and beyond in all the work he touches. He pays great attention to detail and is a constant learner.
list.author: Based Supplies

list.quote: Working with Abrham completely changed our social presence. In just over a month, we grew from 3K to 7K followers, with multiple videos surpassing 100K views and engagement skyrocketing.
list.author: Biruh Fit

list.quote: From the start, Abrham was exactly what we were looking for. The editing quality was top-tier, communication was seamless, and we only wish we had more projects to work on together..
list.author: Addis AI

list.quote: Working with Abrham has changed my life. It sounds crazy but the spark and momentum I feel with social media can truly be life changing. It all started 30 days ago and we teamed up on a social media project. He literally helped me grow from 0-1600+ followers within these 30 days!!! On top of that, he’s a great, compassionate person and has given great life and motivational advice. He’s the guy. Thank you so much and we’ll stay in touch
list.author: Denny Wang
